positioning: For conversations where engineering needs architecture, delivery, and product reading.
title: Bring context.
description: If the role needs someone who understands process, designs architecture, implements software, and connects application, backend, and cloud, this is the right conversation.

qualificationItems.label: Focus
qualificationItems.description: Software engineering, architecture, APIs, cloud, automation, performance, and systems that need to support decisions.

qualificationItems.label: Reading
qualificationItems.description: I work best when there is room to understand tradeoffs, remove noise, and turn loose requirements into executable direction.

qualificationItems.label: Pace
qualificationItems.description: I prefer direct conversations: real context, clear constraints, and next steps that respect the evaluator's time.

panelDescription: Use the channel that best fits technical fit, delivery history, or a specific opportunity.
linkedinDescription: Best for starting a conversation with professional context.
githubDescription: Code, technical decisions, and execution signals.
resumeDescription: For fast screening, download the resume in the active language.
